issues.impact: Short titles miss ranking and CTR opportunities.
issues.recommendation: Expand to 50-60 chars, naturally including the primary keyword and a value prop.

issues.impact: No meta description = lower CTR and Google writing its own snippet.
issues.recommendation: Add a unique 140-160 char description with primary keyword and a call to action.

issues.impact: Pages under ~300 words rarely rank for competitive queries.
issues.recommendation: Expand with examples, FAQs, or supporting depth — or noindex if the page isn't meant to rank.

issues.message: Page has no JSON-LD structured data
issues.impact: Without structured data, rich results (FAQs, breadcrumbs, ratings) aren't eligible.
issues.recommendation: Add JSON-LD markup appropriate to the page type (Article, Product, FAQPage, etc.).

issues.message: Missing Open Graph tags: og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url
issues.impact: Missing OG tags cause ugly social shares with no image or summary.
issues.recommendation: Add og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url to every public page.

issues.impact: Twitter falls back to a plain link without a card.
